title: Jschlatt Music Discs
description: Adds all of jschlatt's song covers as music discs.
body:
## Adds all of jschlatt's song covers as music discs.

### Includes:
- [My Way](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0uksSl1Teek)
- [(Everybody's Waitin' For) The Man With The Bag](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ziCsclD9jnY)
- [Baby It's Cold Outside](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KR7eJft_aqc)
- [Happy Holiday](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dZVT60baWWA)
- [Have Yourself A Merry Little Christmas](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uTJ4FXbzVBA)
- [It's The Most Wonderful Time Of The Year](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nyoQ_5Q7geo)
- [Let It Snow! Let It Snow! Let It Snow!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5O4yLDVBr4s)
- [Mele Kalikimaka](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N6YE6ocl27o)
- [Santa Claus Is Coming To Town](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6JeAnrziLLo)
- [Sleigh Ride](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f4p2-bp4zmc)
- [The Christmas Song](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1Ggr94QhXo4)
- [White Christmas](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jZ0Q5zVCVJ8)

### Credits:
**All rights to the music tracks goes to jschlatt (obviously)**

"(Everybody's Waitin' for) The Man with the Bag" || Written by: Irving Taylor, Dudley Brooks, Hal Stanley || Produced by: Hal Rosenfeld || Arranger: Ladd McIntosh || Conductor: Hal Rosenfeld || Vocal Engineer: Ian Kagey || Engineer: Steve Genewick, Harry Risoleo || Assistant Engineer: Joyie Lai, Tommy Hessenius || Studio Assistant: Hector Cortez || Mixer: Steve Genewick || Mastering: Eric Boulanger, at The Bakery Mastering || Recorded at: Bandrika Studios, Renaissance Recording

"Mele Kalikimaka" || Written by: Robert Alex Anderson || Produced by: Hal Rosenfeld || Arranger: Tom Kubis || Conductor: Hal Rosenfeld || Vocal Engineer: Ian Kagey || Engineer: Steve Genewick, Harry Risoleo || Assistant Engineer: Joyie Lai, Tommy Hessenius || Studio Assistant: Hector Cortez || Mixer: Steve Genewick || Mastering: Eric Boulanger, at The Bakery Mastering || Recorded at: Bandrika Studios, Renaissance Recording

"Sleigh Ride" || Written by: Leroy Anderson, Mitchell Parish || Produced by: Hal Rosenfeld || Arranger: James McMillen || Conductor: Hal Rosenfeld || Sleigh Bells: Hal Rosenfeld || Vocal Engineer: Ian Kagey || Engineer: Steve Genewick, Harry Risoleo || Assistant Engineer: Joyie Lai, Tommy Hessenius || Studio Assistant: Hector Cortez || Mixer: Steve Genewick || Mastering: Eric Boulanger, at The Bakery Mastering || Recorded at: Bandrika Studios, Renaissance Recording

"A Very 1999 Christmas" || Engineering: David Cinci || Assistant: Roberto Moreno || Vocal production: Alex Anders || Arranger: Tom Scott || Producer: Cameell Hanna || Music supervisor: JoAnn Tominaga || Mixer: Steve Genewick || Mastering: Eric Boulanger, at The Bakery Mastering || Recorded at: Sound Factory in Hollywood
